display.purpose: Hero H1 only. Gold em span on one phrase.

headline.purpose: Section h2. Uppercase with gold em pattern.

title.purpose: Card titles, FAQ questions, component headings.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, descriptions. Max 65-75ch. Muted Linen on dark.

label.purpose: Section eyebrows, form labels, badge text, nav links.

shadows.name: nav-scroll
shadows.purpose: Sticky nav after scroll; pairs with backdrop-filter blur(8px).

shadows.name: hero-form-lift
shadows.purpose: Hero quote form panel only. Establishes it as primary conversion surface.

shadows.name: gold-glow-float
shadows.purpose: Floating contact CTA button. Warm ambient glow; fixed position only.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transitions (color, border, background). 0.2s duration.

motion.name: ease-image
motion.purpose: Project photo scale on hover. 0.5s duration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Gold background, dark text. At most one per viewport section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C8961E; color: #0F1923; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E8B84B; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C8961E; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with white-tint border; border and text shift to gold on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #F5F3EF; padding: 13px 24px; font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 48px; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #C8961E; color: #C8961E; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C8961E; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Distinctive corner-bracket pattern. Brackets expand on hover. Ghost numeral watermark.
components.html:
01

ROOFING

Full roof replacement and repair for residential and commercial properties.

LEARN MORE →
components.css: .ds-service-card { position: relative; background: #0e1622; border: 1px solid #1a2535; padding: 28px 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.25s, border-color 0.25s; } .ds-service-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-top: 2px solid #D4AF37; border-left: 2px solid #D4AF37; transition: width 0.2s, height 0.2s; } .ds-service-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 10px; right: 10px; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-bottom: 2px solid #D4AF37; border-right: 2px solid #D4AF37; transition: width 0.2s, height 0.2s; } .ds-service-card:hover { background: #131e30; border-color: #253548; } .ds-service-card:hover::before, .ds-service-card:hover::after { width: 22px; height: 22px; } .ds-card-num { font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #D4AF37; margin-bottom: 18px; } .ds-card-name { font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; color: #fff; margin: 0 0 10px; line-height: 1.15; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: #8a9aaa; line-height: 1.65; flex: 1; } .ds-card-link { font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; color: #D4AF37; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 1.25rem; padding-top: 1rem; border-top: 1px solid #1a2535; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Minimal stroke-based input. Gold border on focus.
components.css: .ds-form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #8A9BAA; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-input { background: #1A2736; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 3px; padding: 12px 14px; color: #F5F3EF; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; min-height: 48px; transition: border-color 0.2s; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8A9BAA; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #C8961E; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #C8961E; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Gold rule + uppercase eyebrow. Opens every section. Signature system-wide pattern.
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #C8961E; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-section-label::before { content: ''; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: #C8961E; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Nav CTA
components.description: Compact gold CTA in the navbar. No underline pseudo-element.
components.css: .ds-nav-cta { background: #C8961E; color: #0F1923; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 3px; font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.2s; border: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #E8B84B; } .ds-nav-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C8961E; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Area Chip
components.description: Service area tags. Gold-tinted border and background. Gold map pin icon.
components.html: Portland
components.css: .ds-area-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; background: rgba(200,150,30,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(200,150,30,0.12); border-radius: 3px; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #F5F3EF; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

components.name: Footer Social Icon
components.description: Social icon square. Muted at rest; gold border and icon on hover.
components.css: .ds-social-icon { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #8A9BAA; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-social-icon:hover { border-color: #C8961E; color: #C8961E; } .ds-social-icon:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C8961E; outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview:
J-RNW is built the way a foreman runs a job site: everything in its place, no wasted motion, every element accountable. The deep navy palette commands attention at arm's length on a phone screen in bright daylight. The gold accent is the mark of earned confidence. Every interface decision answers to one question: does this make a skeptical homeowner more likely to pick up the phone?

The system rejects SaaS cream, low-budget contractor clichés, and cold corporate palettes by name. The result is a committed dark system with a single saturated accent. Navy surfaces stack in four lightness steps. Gold appears on at most 15% of any given screen; its scarcity is its authority.
keyCharacteristics: Deep navy in four tonal steps; no pure black, no gray without blue
Gold is earned: CTA, icon accent, active state, section label; never decoration
Barlow Condensed for every headline; Barlow for body; no third typeface
Corners are almost square: 2-4px max on interactive elements
Grid gaps of 2-3px create seams; sections feel architectural
Section labels use a 24px gold rule before the text; consistent system-wide

rules.name: The Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Construction Gold (#C8961E) appears on no more than 15% of any given screen. Never fill a section background with gold.

rules.name: The Seam Rule
rules.body: Use rgba(200,150,30,0.06) on grid wrappers and 2-3px gaps on cells. These seams are structural, not decorative.

rules.name: The Uppercase Contract
rules.body: Every Barlow Condensed instance is text-transform: uppercase. No exceptions.

rules.name: The Gold Em Rule
rules.body: In display and headline text, exactly one phrase per heading gets gold color via an em span (font-style: normal). One voice elevated. Not two, not zero.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Service cards, project cards, contact form, FAQ accordion: no box-shadow at rest. Shadows are earned by floating, scroll-response, or emergency contexts only.

dos: Use Construction Gold (#C8961E) as the single accent. One voice, one color.
Use the four-step dark surface stack to create depth before reaching for shadows.
Keep Barlow Condensed at 800 weight and uppercase on every headline.
Put at most one primary gold CTA button in each viewport section.
Use the 24px gold rule + uppercase label before every section heading.
Use the corner bracket ::before/::after pattern on service cards.
Use rgba(200,150,30,0.06) as grid wrapper background with 2-3px gaps.
Size all tap targets to minimum 48px height on mobile.
Pair every h2 with the gold-em pattern: one phrase in gold via font-style:normal em.
donts: Don't use SaaS cream: soft whites, Inter on beige, rounded-everything aesthetic.
Don't use low-budget contractor stock clichés: clip-art hammers, safety-yellow CTAs.
Don't use cold corporate palettes: all-blue with zero warmth.
Don't use border-radius above 4px on buttons, cards, or inputs.
Don't fill any content section with a gold background.
Don't add a second typeface. Barlow and Barlow Condensed are the entire type system.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Nav blur is state-driven and purposeful only.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Gold text is always solid color.
Don't add shadows to static card or list elements.
Don't use the hero-metric template as a standalone section pattern.
